det_check_template:
proof fn det_write_setup_metadata_to_region(pre_pm_region: PMRegion, region_size: u64, log_id: u128, post1_pm_region: PMRegion, r1: (), post2_pm_region: PMRegion, r2: ())
    requires (pre_pm_region.inv()), (pre_pm_region@.no_outstanding_writes()), (pre_pm_region@.len() == region_size), (region_size >= ABSOLUTE_POS_OF_LOG_AREA + MIN_LOG_AREA_SIZE),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_pm_region.inv())
            &&& (post1_pm_region.constants() == pre_pm_region.constants())
            &&& (memory_correctly_set_up_on_region(
            post1_pm_region@.flush().committed(),  // it'll be correct after the next flush
            region_size,
            log_id,
        ))
            &&& (metadata_types_set(post1_pm_region@.flush().committed()))
            &&& (post2_pm_region.inv())
            &&& (post2_pm_region.constants() == pre_pm_region.constants())
            &&& (memory_correctly_set_up_on_region(
            post2_pm_region@.flush().committed(),  // it'll be correct after the next flush
            region_size,
            log_id,
        ))
            &&& (metadata_types_set(post2_pm_region@.flush().committed()))
        }) ==> det_write_setup_metadata_to_region_equal(r1, r2, post1_pm_region, post2_pm_region),
{
{ASSUMES}}
